/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/optimization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/nelderMead.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/newtonTr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/bfgs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/ga.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimization_project.dir/pso.cpp.o -o optimization_project
